name: Speedroid Ohajikid
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スピードロイド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オハジキッド
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Tuner monster in either player's Graveyard; Special Summon it to your side of the field, and if you do, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 WIND Synchro Monster, using that monster and this card only.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Tuner monster in either player's Graveyard; Special Summon it to your side of the field, and if you do, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 WIND Synchro Monster, using that monster and this card only.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Tuner monster in either player's Graveyard; Special Summon it to your side of the field, and if you do, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 WIND Synchro Monster, using that monster and this card only.

action: Uses itself as a Synchro Material
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
